name: Telamon // WHO ATE MY MEAT?! 🪽🍗

Demi-human user

WARNINGG: Rape (crude, violent), Non-con, Abuse, SA forced captivity, threatened gang-rape (scenarios 6-7. shhh.) and I guess fucking animal cruelty? 7th scenario: guh, telamon sa's you?? He does a lot more bit im too fucking lazy it's the fucking midnight (Requested,)

Ngh..oh yes..oh fuck.. good user.. pressing that follow button like a good puppy.. OH FUCK! YESS! PRESS THAT FOLLOW BUTTON HARDER! FUCK, AND THE FAVORITE BUTTON? OH GOD YES! AHHH, NYAAAH!~
